source_summary.operator_intent: CKC and PoseKit are already native Handshake Atelier tools. The overhaul should first correct framing and workflow parity: the top-right button should be Atelier, CKC should be a tab/workspace inside Atelier, and later MTs should restore the proven original CKC/PoseKit production workflows without disturbing the active GUI rebuild WP.
source_summary.current_handshake_read: Current Handshake already has Rust-native Atelier domain modules for character data, media, intake, collections/contact sheets, documents/story/moodboards, search/tags/similarity, PoseKit/OpenPose sidecars, identity profiles, and ComfyUI receipts. The largest immediate gap is UI/navigation framing and presentation parity, not absence of a native Rust data layer.
source_summary.original_ckc_read: Original CastKit Codex confirms the operator's memory: CKC was a character/avatar database plus sheet/versioning, linked images and collections, search/tags/notes/story/moodboards, intake sorting, contact sheets, PoseKit/OpenPose, ComfyUI bridge, identity profiles, and visual book/split layout.
source_summary.facial_read: Facial is a Rust image-quality, identity, dedupe, review, and dataset-prep app with headless command/receipt APIs. It is valuable as a future Atelier ingest helper, but should not be pulled into the first CKC/PoseKit shell-polish MT.
source_summary.leeseo_read: The Leeseo handoff asks for deterministic prompt feedback inside Handshake with importable prompt/render receipts, review verdicts, rule-pack rewrites, and traceable exports. It is adjacent to Atelier/Comfy/intake, but should be a later prompt-feedback lane rather than the first CKC UI correction.

delegated_evidence.summary: Confirmed CKC is currently a top-level control in React and native UI, while Atelier is already the actual default tab/panel/backend shell. Recommended smallest next MT is visible label inversion only: top module label CKC -> Atelier and displayed Atelier tab label -> CKC, while preserving internal CKC IDs and /atelier routes.

Confirmed original CKC feature groups and their implementation/planning status: character sheets, image collections, search, tags/notes, story/moodboard, intake, contact sheets, PoseKit, OpenPose sidecars, ComfyUI, and identity profiles.

Extracted Handshake prompt-feedback kernel requests: PromptCase/Receipt/RenderReceipt/ReviewVerdict/FailureTag/RulePack/RewriteTrace/PromptExport records, PostgreSQL/EventLedger authority, vector search as advisory only, and Leeseo i76 fixtures as first adapter material.

Confirmed Facial is a Rust image-curation app with non-destructive ingest, quality/identity/dedupe analysis, accept/reject/hold review sessions, content-hash IDs, montage ID maps, export lineage, command/receipt APIs, and UI inspection. Classified it as direct ingest-pattern reuse and adjacent future Handshake tooling, not CKC/PoseKit core or a current runtime dependency.

ui_shell.finding: The top-right module rail still exposes CKC as a top-level module label. The module default tab is Atelier Editor, and the right side panel is already Atelier/CKC.
ui_shell.risk: Changing only visible text without updating tests and accessibility expectations will create misleading state or test failures.
ui_shell.safe_next_step: Create MT-004 for visible label inversion with internal IDs preserved: displayed top module CKC -> Atelier; displayed Atelier tab -> CKC; keep ModuleId::Ckc, serialized CKC, module-ckc, PaneType::AtelierEditor, and /atelier routes unchanged.

native_backend_domain.finding: Rust Atelier backend already covers most original CKC data concepts.
coverage: character documents, story cards, and story beats
search, tags, AI tag suggestions, and perceptual similarity
pose context, OpenPose rigs, sidecars, identity profiles, identity crops
ComfyUI workflow receipts, output registration, retry/fallback state
native_backend_domain.risk: Treating this as a Rust rewrite problem will cause rework; the direct gap is native UI presentation and workflow affordances over existing Rust state.

manual_and_model_surfaces.finding: MT-002 added a native-first quickstart. Existing model manual rows already describe Atelier CKC/PoseKit commands, but many Pose/Comfy command rows are planned rather than wired routes.
manual_and_model_surfaces.risk: A no-context model may see the word CKC as a top-level module while the manual says Atelier is the native shell. Labeling and manual navigation should converge.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Character/avatar database with reusable character data sheets for CUI workflows, porn production workflows, Unreal, Blender, and related production contexts.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust Atelier character identity and append-only sheet/version surfaces exist.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Need visual CKC tab/work surface that feels like the original character book, not just backend commands.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Link images and folders to a character sheet; create albums per character; keep large picture browsing close to editable sheet data.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust Atelier media, collection, and contact-sheet modules exist.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: UI should expose image-left/sheet-right and albums/collections as first-class CKC tab affordances.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Fuzzy search, vector search, combination search, rich tags, image notes, tag notes, and character-sheet notes.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust Atelier search/tags/similarity and media review metadata exist.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Baseline parity is FTS/saved search/dHash-style similarity. Fuzzy typo tolerance and embedding/vector search should not be claimed until implemented. Tag notes remain unproven in original CKC and should be a separate decision.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Story panels per character; moodboards should use Handshake's native Notion-style moodboard system rather than the failed Excalidraw-style attempt.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust Atelier documents/story/moodboard modules exist; native Handshake already has graph/canvas/moodboard-adjacent primitives.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Need Atelier CKC tab layout that can show the third middle panel only for stories, sheet notes, and moodboards.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Original CKC worked like a book: left panel almost always images from a character sheet, right panel editable sheet; stories, sheet notes, and moodboard add a third middle panel.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Native shell has panes, side panels, tab bars, persistent layout, and Stage interop, but CKC-specific book layout parity has not been visually verified in this MT.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Needs a later visual/behavioral MT after shell label correction.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: PoseKit/OpenRepose takes an image, shows a live 3D figure and OpenPose split view, rotates pose/head angle, rerenders OpenPose, and exports ComfyUI-ready OpenPose.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust Atelier PoseKit stores pose context, rigs, sidecars, identity profiles/crops, and deferred features; detector execution remains out-of-module/capability-gated.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Need UI parity audit for actual split 3D/OpenPose surface. Current MT did not prove a live native PoseKit viewport.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Toggle markers, adjust facial marker placement, zoom/framing to force lens/angle by adding black space, add/remove body markers, remove bad limbs, later sculpt single-model and group poses.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust PoseKit has deferred-feature registry entries for draggable overlays, marker placement, 3D live split, forked history, multi-angle export, sync zoom, import OpenPose JSON, and multi-subject carry-forward.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Do not mark advanced PoseKit parity complete. Use deferred entries to drive later MTs after CKC/Atelier shell is coherent.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Image ingest front for large datasets; mark pass/reject/unsure; mass apply tags/notes/events/dates/location; link passed images to a character sheet.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Rust Atelier intake/image import/media review exists, with image-import route and media review metadata.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Native UI should expose accepted/rejected/pending states and batch metadata as LoRA-mining workflow, not generic intake only.

original_ckc_parity_groups.operator_intent: Flexible contact sheet creator with DPI, rows, columns, export, usable by image-mining models for visual inspection.
original_ckc_parity_groups.handshake_current: Atelier collections/contact sheets exist in model manual; raster proof not checked in this MT.
original_ckc_parity_groups.gap: Minimum parity is deterministic contact sheet manifest/SVG. Raster export and global creator should be separate later MTs.

useful_capabilities: review montage PNG plus stable tile/image ID maps
facial.safe_stance: Create a later MT/WP for Atelier ingest to call or absorb Facial capabilities through deterministic command/receipt surfaces. Do not mix Facial integration into MT-004's UI naming correction.

useful_capabilities: vector search as advisory but not rewrite authority
leeseo_prompt_feedback.safe_stance: Use as a later Atelier/Comfy prompt-feedback lane after shell and CKC/PoseKit presentation are clarified.

recommended_microtask_queue.title: Rename top CKC module label to Atelier and CKC tab label inside Atelier
recommended_microtask_queue.why_first: It directly matches the operator's latest concrete correction, is small, and aligns current UI language with the native Atelier architecture before broader visual rebuild work.
base_scope: Change displayed top-right module label from CKC to Atelier.
Change displayed Atelier tab/work-surface label to CKC where it represents the CKC default tab.
Preserve internal ModuleId::Ckc, serialized CKC active_module, module-ckc stable id, PaneType::AtelierEditor, backend /atelier routes, and persisted layout compatibility.
verification_needs: Search for visible CKC module-label expectations
If React surface is still shipped, update its label tests separately or explicitly mark React legacy surface as not in MT-004

risks.risk: Breaking layout persistence by renaming internal IDs.
risks.mitigation: Change visible labels only; keep CKC serialization and stable data IDs.

risks.risk: Confusing CKC embeds and refKind names by renaming domain IDs.
risks.mitigation: Do not change embed ref kinds, route names, table names, or serialized module IDs in MT-004.

risks.risk: Collision with active GUI rebuild WP.
risks.mitigation: Stage only MT-004-owned files and ignore inherited WP-KERNEL-012 baseline dirt.

recommended_microtask_queue.title: Audit native Atelier/CKC visual layout against original book workflow
recommended_microtask_queue.why_second: After the shell label is corrected, the next useful unit is proving what the native CKC tab actually renders versus the original left-image/right-sheet/optional-middle-panel workflow.
verification_needs: Run the native GUI visual/debug route or headless UI snapshot if available
Compare CKC tab to original book layout requirements
Record missing controls for image strip, sheet editor, story/sheet-note/moodboard middle panel, and model-navigable stable IDs

recommended_microtask_queue.title: PoseKit native split-view and deferred-feature audit
recommended_microtask_queue.why_later: PoseKit parity is bigger and has known deferred features. It should follow the CKC shell and layout correction instead of being mixed with button naming.
verification_needs: Verify whether a native 3D/OpenPose split view exists
Map deferred pose features to visible UI gaps
Decide first PoseKit implementation MT: sidecar strip, split view, import OpenPose JSON, sync zoom, or marker editing

recommended_microtask_queue.title: Atelier ingest lane: CKC accepted/rejected/pending plus Facial reuse decision
recommended_microtask_queue.why_later: The ingest story matters for LoRA mining but should reuse existing Atelier intake plus Facial's command/receipt/review surfaces. It is not required for the immediate shell correction.

recommended_microtask_queue.title: Atelier prompt feedback lane from Leeseo handoff
recommended_microtask_queue.why_later: Prompt feedback belongs with Comfy/Atelier lineage after basic CKC/PoseKit navigation and visual surfaces are coherent.

explicit_non_goals_preserved: Do not turn this WP into Rust rebuilds of Affinity, Photoshop, Marvelous Designer, or full 3D avatar creation.
Do not import Facial directly into CKC before an explicit integration MT/WP.
Do not claim fuzzy/vector search parity unless current Handshake proves typo-tolerant and embedding/vector search.
Do not claim advanced PoseKit parity while marker editing, multi-angle export, sync zoom, OpenPose JSON import, and multi-subject interactions remain deferred.
Do not disturb ../wtc-native-editors-v1 or the active WP-KERNEL-012 GUI rebuild worktree.
open_questions_for_later_not_blocking_mt: Should React app/src surfaces still be maintained in the hotfix, or should MT-004 be native-only?
Should the displayed CKC tab eventually split into sub-tabs: Characters, Media, Story, Moodboard, PoseKit, Ingest, Workflow?
Should tag notes be added as a real entity, or are image notes, sheet notes, collection notes, and document notes enough?
Should Facial be called as an external command/receipt helper first, or should its Rust modules be absorbed into handshake_core later?
